race.comment: TIGERS ROAR (1) was well supported resuming over 1100m and proved too strong, scoring by 3.5 lengths. Has to manage a wide gate today, but has good early speed, and he can win again with average luck. STRAYA PRIDE (5) improved last start when beaten 1.3L over 1200m at this track, making it five minor placings from seven runs this preparation. Jarrod Todd sticks, and his best form puts him right in this. NO I'M NOT (9) spiked her figures beating JULY over 1200m. Has a handy gate and 2kg claim and won't have to be much better to feature. RISING WATER (12) peaks and is knocking on the door. Will get every chance from an inside barrier.
